text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I blew right through the Kokura Kinen!<n>You can
just call me<n>Matikane-kokura from now on!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...Actually, scratch that. That one's a<n>little much,
even for me. But anyway...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I believe we promised to go<n>somewhere together!
Onwards, to the<n>other most sacred spot in
Fukuoka.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The street food district of Hakata,<n>obviously!
Bowing your head before<n>a divine bowl of ramen
will earn you a<n>heavenly reward.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's so good and packed with<n>nutrients! Nothing
beats the rich<n>juiciness of tonkotsu ramen!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Come on! Let us partake of the nectar<n>of the gods
and have ourselves a<n>divine feast!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure what this has to do with<n>the gods, but
we both enjoy a bowl<n>of ramen together.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I have an idea for our next<n>race. I'd like to
run in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It was only the compassion from my<n>devoted fans
that got me a spot in the<n>Takarazuka Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But this time, I want to actually earn<n>all those
votes!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's take all these wishes we've<n>gathered and
bring them to Nakayama<n>at the end of the year.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Do you mean it? Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
My senior year is finally coming to a<n>close. Let's
finish it off just like we<n>did those bowls of ramen!
